package repository

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for transaction_helper_outside_repository_or_uow_package: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Transaction helpers buried in handlers or services instead of a repository or unit-of-work package.
type CaseTransactionHelperOutsideRepositoryOrUowPackageDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseTransactionHelperOutsideRepositoryOrUowPackageModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseTransactionHelperOutsideRepositoryOrUowPackageRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseTransactionHelperOutsideRepositoryOrUowPackageModel
}

type CaseTransactionHelperOutsideRepositoryOrUowPackageService struct {
    repo *CaseTransactionHelperOutsideRepositoryOrUowPackageRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseTransactionHelperOutsideRepositoryOrUowPackageAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveTransactionHelperOutsideRepositoryOrUowPackage(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseTransactionHelperOutsideRepositoryOrUowPackageDTO) error {
    WithTransaction := func(db *gorm.DB, fn func(tx *gorm.DB) error) error {
        tx := db.Begin()
        if err := fn(tx); err != nil {
            tx.Rollback()
            return err
        }
        return tx.Commit().Error
    }
    return WithTransaction(db, func(tx *gorm.DB) error {
        return tx.Where("id = ?", input).Find(&items).Error
    })
}
